allow: Bash(ansible --version)
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "pwd && ls -la ~/wmg-cyberrange-internship")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "cd ~/wmg-cyberrange-internship && echo '--ANSIBLE--'; ansible --version 2>&1; echo '--DOCKER--'; docker ps -a 2>&1; echo '--INVENTORY--'; cat inventory/hosts.ini 2>&1; echo '--GAME DIRS--'; ls -la games/network-recon games/shellshock games/ssh-weak-password 2>&1; echo '--RESEARCH LOG--'; ls -la research-logs 2>&1")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "cd ~/wmg-cyberrange-internship && ansible -i inventory/hosts.ini cyberrange -m ping 2>&1; echo '--WHICH--'; which sshpass hydra nmap python3 2>&1; echo '--CONTAINER PY--'; docker exec cyberrange-target which python3 python3.6 2>&1; docker exec cyberrange-target cat /etc/os-release 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target python3 --version; docker exec cyberrange-target python3.6 --version; which hydra nmap; ansible --version | head -1")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target bash -c 'cat /etc/apt/sources.list; echo ---; curl -sI http://archive.ubuntu.com 2>&1 | head -3; echo ---PING---; ping -c1 8.8.8.8 2>&1'")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-get update 2>&1 | tail -30")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-cache policy python3.7 python3.8 python3.9 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-get install -y python3.8 2>&1 | tail -15")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "cd ~/wmg-cyberrange-internship && ansible -i inventory/hosts.ini cyberrange -m ping 2>&1")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-cache policy python3.9 python3.10 2>&1; echo '---'; docker exec cyberrange-target bash -c 'apt-get install -y software-properties-common 2>&1 | tail -5'")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target add-apt-repository -y ppa:deadsnakes/ppa 2>&1 | tail -20")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-cache policy python3.10 python3.11 2>&1")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-get update 2>&1 | grep -i deadsnakes; docker exec cyberrange-target apt-cache madison python3.10 python3.11 python3.12")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'docker exec cyberrange-target sh -c "lz4 -d /var/lib/apt/lists/ppa.launchpad.net_deadsnakes_ppa_ubuntu_dists_bionic_main_binary-amd64_Packages.lz4 -c | grep Package:"')
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc 'docker exec cyberrange-target apt-cache search "^python3\\." ')

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-get install -y wget ca-certificates 2>&1 | tail -5; docker exec cyberrange-target wget -q --spider https://github.com && echo GITHUB_OK || echo GITHUB_FAIL")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target apt-get install -y build-essential zlib1g-dev libssl-dev libbz2-dev libreadline-dev libsqlite3-dev libffi-dev liblzma-dev 2>&1 | tail -8")
Bash(wsl.exe *)
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target wget -q --spider https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.11.9/Python-3.11.9.tgz && echo URL_OK || echo URL_FAIL")

PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target bash -c 'cd /usr/src && wget -q https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.11.9/Python-3.11.9.tgz && tar xzf Python-3.11.9.tgz && ls'")
PowerShell(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "docker exec cyberrange-target bash -c 'cd /usr/src/Python-3.11.9 && ./configure --prefix=/usr/local --enable-optimizations 2>&1 | tail -20'")
